## Topic

Describe the technical topic or documentation improvement.

## Audience

Who needs this explanation?

## Infrastructure layer

Select one or more:

- [ ] Player experience
- [ ] AI control and orchestration
- [ ] Cloud execution
- [ ] Data, inventory and entitlement
- [ ] Governance, security and privacy

## Question to answer

What specific question should the documentation answer?

## Verification

What examples, boundaries or evidence would make the explanation useful?

## Safety check

- [ ] I have not included credentials, personal data or confidential information.
- [ ] This request does not make unsupported financial-return or product-availability claims.
